number: 美國核准專利（公司公開揭露）
title: 誘導自噬、降解突變 ataxin-3 之 MSC 治療機制
note: → 本社 MoA（誘導細胞自噬清除突變 ataxin-3）有美國核准專利保護（公司公開揭露）。具體專利號未見於公開新聞——本社自家 IP 建議由 Steminent 內部提供以完整化，勝過外部推測。

en.title: MSC mechanism inducing autophagy to clear mutant ataxin-3
en.note: → Our mechanism of action (inducing autophagy to clear mutant ataxin-3) is covered by a granted US patent, per the company’s own disclosure. The patent number does not appear in public reporting — Steminent should supply its own IP details internally rather than have them inferred from outside.

title: Riluzole prodrugs and their use（利魯唑前驅藥組成物）
expiry: 約 2036-02-26（估計，未計最長 5 年專利期延長）
note: → Troriluzole 的組成物護城河到 2036；即使 FDA 已退件，只要 Biohaven 重啟或對外授權，這道 IP 仍在，是評估其後路的關鍵。

en.title: Riluzole prodrugs and their use
en.expiry: ~2036-02-26 (estimate, excluding up to 5 years of term extension)
en.note: → Troriluzole’s composition moat runs to 2036. Even after the FDA rejection, this IP stands if Biohaven restarts or out-licenses the programme — key to assessing its fallback options.

title: Use of riluzole prodrugs to treat ataxias（利魯唑前驅藥治療共濟失調之用途）
expiry: 若核准約至 2038-11（估計，申請日＋20 年）
note: → 直接鎖定共濟失調（含 SCA）適應症用途，仍審查中，是最該盯的一件——核准與否影響同類前驅藥在 SCA 的用途空間。

en.title: Use of riluzole prodrugs to treat ataxias
en.expiry: If granted, to ~2038-11 (estimate, filing date + 20 years)
en.note: → Targets the ataxia indication (including SCA) directly and is still under examination — the single most important one to watch, since the outcome shapes how much room other prodrugs have in SCA.

number: US 10,590,421 B2（LUMC 基礎平台專利）
title: CAG 三核苷酸重複之反義寡核苷酸外顯子跳躍（polyQ 疾病）
status: 已核准；部分成員已因未繳年費失效
expiry: 基礎專利期約至 2030；VO659 專屬組成之較新請求項應在後續申請案（未列於此）
note: → VO659 的 CAG exon-skipping 技術源自 LUMC 授權；此基礎專利已老化／部分失效，屬 Vico IP 的潛在弱點；資產專屬保護需看較新的 Vico/LUMC 申請案。

en.title: Antisense oligonucleotide exon skipping of CAG trinucleotide repeats (polyQ diseases)
en.status: Granted; some family members lapsed for unpaid annuities
en.expiry: Foundational term to ~2030; newer claims specific to VO659 would sit in later filings (not listed here)
en.note: → VO659’s CAG exon-skipping technology is licensed from LUMC; this foundational patent is ageing and partly lapsed, a potential weak point in Vico’s IP. Asset-specific protection depends on newer Vico/LUMC filings.

title: RNAi agents for inhibiting expression of ataxin-2 (ATXN2)（抑制 ATXN2 的 RNAi 藥劑）
status: 審查中（PCT，2024-09-26 公開，已進多國國家階段）
note: → Arrowhead ATXN2 siRNA 的核心 IP，2024 新申請、專利壽命長（約 2044）；SCA2 專屬（本社刻意避開 SCA2），屬鄰域監控。

en.title: RNAi agents for inhibiting expression of ataxin-2 (ATXN2)
en.status: Under examination (PCT published 2024-09-26, national phase entered in several countries)
en.note: → Core IP for Arrowhead’s ATXN2 siRNA: filed in 2024 with a long life (to about 2044). SCA2-specific — a subtype we deliberately avoid — so this is adjacent-space monitoring.

title: ATXN3 反義寡核苷酸（SCA3 ASO）
note: → BIIB132 於 2023 放棄開發，其 SCA3 ASO 之 IP（Ionis 揭露持有）現為防禦／潛在再授權資產。另注意 Roche 亦持有 ATXN3 ASO 專利（TW202113082A，優先權 2019）——ATXN3 ASO 空間不只一家。

en.title: ATXN3 antisense oligonucleotide (SCA3 ASO)
en.note: → BIIB132 was abandoned in 2023; the SCA3 ASO IP (disclosed as held by Ionis) is now a defensive or potentially re-licensable asset. Note that Roche also holds ATXN3 ASO patents (TW202113082A, priority 2019) — the ATXN3 ASO space has more than one player.
